mapper.select: SELECT c.id as clothesId, c.user_id as userId, c.category, c.sub_category as subCategory, c.season, c.color, c.material, c.style, c.occasion, IFNULL(c.favorite_count, 0) as favoriteCount, IFNULL(c.wear_count, 0) as wearCount FROM wardrobe_clothes c WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.is_public = '1' ORDER BY c.favorite_count DESC, c.wear_count DESC

SELECT f.user_id as userId, f.clothes_id as clothesId, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(f.create_time) * 1000 as actionTime FROM wardrobe_clothes_favorite f INNER JOIN wardrobe_clothes c ON f.clothes_id = c.id WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.is_public = '1' ORDER BY f.user_id, f.create_time DESC
SELECT id FROM wardrobe_clothes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT clothes_id FROM wardrobe_clothes_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT style_code as styleCode, style_name as styleName, IFNULL(preference_level, 3) as weight FROM wardrobe_user_style WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY preference_level DESC
SELECT scene_code as sceneCode, scene_name as sceneName, IFNULL(frequency, 3) as weight FROM wardrobe_user_scene WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY frequency DESC
SELECT location FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
